inputs.price_source: Reference price equals base-case probability-weighted milestone component sum; non-tradeable CVR has no reliable OTC quote (0.000 on broker screens Jul 2026) [Assumption for yield curve]
inputs.shares_source: One CVR per pre-merger Abiomed share tendered; ~25.76M shares accepted Dec 2022 (https://www.jnj.com/media-center/press-releases/johnson-johnson-completes-acquisition-of-abiomed)
inputs.max_milestone_source: CVR Agreement and Offer to Purchase (https://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/200406/000119312522285216/d411777dex99a1a.htm)
inputs.normalization_note: Security is a non-tradeable contingent cash claim, not an operating business. Lawrence yield-curve base uses probability-weighted milestone stack from the Dec 2022 CVR Agreement.

bear.notes: All three milestones miss or only minimal delayed net-sales payment; long wait, high discount.

base.notes: Component-weighted expected milestone stack realized on base probabilities by 2029.

bull.notes: Near-maximum $35 stack less modest reserve; FDA and Class I paths succeed on schedule.

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Pure contractual cash claim; no balance sheet

option_scan.question: Backlog / contracted revenue not in FCF path?
option_scan.evidence: Contractual milestone payments up to $35/CVR per CVR Agreement

option_scan.question: Private or illiquid stakes below fair value?
Transitory distribution / legal recovery?
option_scan.evidence: Dated milestone cash payments from JNJ upon achievement

option_scan.question: Embedded product option already in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: Claim is separate from JNJ MedTech equity

optionality_gate.notes: Downside bounded at zero contractual payment per milestone; upside capped at $35/CVR. Illiquidity and JNJ measurement discretion remain real risks.

growth_explanation.mechanism: Return driver is dated milestone realization under the Dec 2022 CVR Agreement, not operating cash-flow growth.
growth_explanation.bear_trigger: 2028 Non-Achievement Notice for net sales and FDA miss by Jan 1, 2028.
growth_explanation.bull_trigger: Full $17.50 net-sales payment plus FDA and Class I milestones before deadlines.

component_valuation.coverage_statement: Four additive components map net-sales, FDA, clinical-recommendation milestones and a timing/execution reserve once each.

valuation.evidence: CVR Agreement 2022-12-22: up to $35/CVR in three milestones; Abiomed FY2022 revenue $1.032B baseline (https://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/815094/000095017022006432/abmd-ex99_1.htm). Proof base 8.3125/CVR via risk_adjusted_milestone_value@1.0.
valuation.assumption_summary: Proof outputs {'low': 0.0, 'base': 8.3125, 'high': 17.5}; probability and timing judgments explicit in graph.
valuation.cross_check: Reconcile to CVR Agreement milestone definitions before decision use.
valuation.falsifier: JNJ certifies milestone non-achievement or Net Sales Statement shows threshold unreachable.

inputs.label: Net sales milestone payment if achieved in 2028 measurement period

source.locator: Milestone Payment (a)(i): $17.50 per CVR if Net Sales Milestone achieved during 2028 Measurement Period

inputs.label: Net sales milestone payment if achieved in 2028-29 measurement period only

source.locator: Milestone Payment (a)(ii): $8.75 per CVR if achieved during 2028-29 Measurement Period after missing 2028 period

inputs.label: Worldwide net sales threshold for net sales milestone

source.locator: Net Sales Milestone: aggregate worldwide Net Sales exceeds $3,700,000,000
Full year revenue totaled $1.032 billion for fiscal year ended March 31, 2022

assumptions.label: Probability of exceeding $3.7B net sales in the 2028 measurement period
assumptions.rationale: FY2022 revenue $1.0B; milestone requires ~3.6× run-rate by JNJ FY2028 Q1 window. JNJ MedTech distribution and Impella penetration partially offset but threshold remains ambitious.

assumptions.label: Probability of reduced $8.75 payment in 2028-29 measurement period
assumptions.rationale: Captures delayed four-quarter achievement at half rate if primary window missed.

calculations.label: Net sales milestone expected value per CVR

valuation.evidence: CVR Agreement 2022-12-22: up to $35/CVR in three milestones; Abiomed FY2022 revenue $1.032B baseline (https://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/815094/000095017022006432/abmd-ex99_1.htm). Proof base 2.625/CVR via risk_adjusted_milestone_value@1.0.
valuation.assumption_summary: Proof outputs {'low': 0.0, 'base': 2.625, 'high': 7.5}; probability and timing judgments explicit in graph.
valuation.cross_check: Reconcile to CVR Agreement milestone definitions before decision use.
valuation.falsifier: JNJ certifies milestone non-achievement or Net Sales Statement shows threshold unreachable.

source.locator: Milestone Payment (b): $7.50 per CVR for FDA Approval Milestone

assumptions.label: Probability of FDA PMA approval for Impella in STEMI without cardiogenic shock by Jan 1, 2028
assumptions.rationale: STEMI DTU trial and regulatory path remain active under JNJ; binary regulatory risk by fixed deadline.

calculations.label: Risk-adjusted FDA milestone value per CVR

valuation.evidence: CVR Agreement 2022-12-22: up to $35/CVR in three milestones; Abiomed FY2022 revenue $1.032B baseline (https://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/815094/000095017022006432/abmd-ex99_1.htm). Proof base 4.5/CVR via risk_adjusted_milestone_value@1.0.

valuation.cross_check: Reconcile to CVR Agreement milestone definitions before decision use.
valuation.falsifier: JNJ certifies milestone non-achievement or Net Sales Statement shows threshold unreachable.

source.locator: Milestone Payment (c): $10.00 per CVR for Clinical Recommendation Milestone

assumptions.label: Probability at least one Class I ACC/AHA guideline recommendation path succeeds by Dec 31, 2029
assumptions.rationale: Three mutually exclusive clinical paths (STEMI, HRPCI, cardiogenic shock); earliest success triggers full payment.

calculations.label: Risk-adjusted clinical recommendation value per CVR

components.label: Tax, timing, definition, and illiquidity reserve

valuation.evidence: CVR Agreement 2022-12-22: up to $35/CVR in three milestones; Abiomed FY2022 revenue $1.032B baseline (https://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/815094/000095017022006432/abmd-ex99_1.htm). Proof base -2.0/CVR via net_asset_value@1.0.
valuation.assumption_summary: Proof outputs {'low': -4.0, 'base': -2.0, 'high': -0.5}; probability and timing judgments explicit in graph.
valuation.cross_check: Reconcile to CVR Agreement milestone definitions before decision use.
valuation.falsifier: JNJ certifies milestone non-achievement or Net Sales Statement shows threshold unreachable.

assumptions.label: Reserve for tax withholding, payment delay, net-sales definition risk, and non-tradeable illiquidity
assumptions.rationale: CVR Agreement permits withholding and measurement disputes; OTC quote unavailable at 0.000.

calculations.label: Timing and execution reserve per CVR

trigger.policy: A complete economic-value analysis is required when any trigger fires; otherwise it is recommended.

component_review_queue.decision_rule: Each assigned rater records accept, challenge, or reject with a proposed range and evidence. The aggregator may not silently average disputed ranges.

items.label: Net sales milestone ($3.7B threshold)
mandatory_checks: Is the valuation method appropriate for this economic claim?
Is the security's ownership claim and economic-unit denominator reconciled correctly?
Does the evidence support the low/base/high range and its timing?
Are comparable assets truly like-for-like after production, contract, location, capital, ownership, and realization adjustments?
For an option, are success probability, time to realization, and remaining owner-funded capital explicit?
Is the component additive, or already embedded in another component?
What observation would move the base estimate materially?

valuation_method_route.label: Scarce assets, royalties, and optionality
failure_modes: gross asset value mistaken for shareholder value
operating cash flow and NAV counted twice
remote options treated as contracted cash
valuation_method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

judgments.label: Net sales milestone ($3.7B threshold)
judgments.evidence: CVR Agreement 2022-12-22: up to $35/CVR in three milestones; Abiomed FY2022 revenue $1.032B baseline (https://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/815094/000095017022006432/abmd-ex99_1.htm). Proof base 8.3125/CVR via risk_adjusted_milestone_value@1.0.

judgments.label: FDA STEMI-without-shock approval milestone
judgments.evidence: CVR Agreement 2022-12-22: up to $35/CVR in three milestones; Abiomed FY2022 revenue $1.032B baseline (https://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/815094/000095017022006432/abmd-ex99_1.htm). Proof base 2.625/CVR via risk_adjusted_milestone_value@1.0.

judgments.label: Class I clinical recommendation milestone
judgments.evidence: CVR Agreement 2022-12-22: up to $35/CVR in three milestones; Abiomed FY2022 revenue $1.032B baseline (https://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/815094/000095017022006432/abmd-ex99_1.htm). Proof base 4.5/CVR via risk_adjusted_milestone_value@1.0.

judgments.label: Tax, timing, definition, and illiquidity reserve
judgments.evidence: CVR Agreement 2022-12-22: up to $35/CVR in three milestones; Abiomed FY2022 revenue $1.032B baseline (https://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/815094/000095017022006432/abmd-ex99_1.htm). Proof base -2.0/CVR via net_asset_value@1.0.

method_route.label: Scarce assets, royalties, and optionality
failure_modes: gross asset value mistaken for shareholder value
operating cash flow and NAV counted twice
remote options treated as contracted cash
method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

valuation.interpretation: value_per_share is withheld while any material additive component is unpriced; priced_components_per_share is not a complete security value.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change cited causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only a terminal multiple.

top_value_drivers.label: Net sales milestone ($3.7B threshold)
top_value_drivers.scenario_assumptions: Proof outputs {'low': 0.0, 'base': 8.3125, 'high': 17.5}; probability and timing judgments explicit in graph.

top_value_drivers.label: Class I clinical recommendation milestone
top_value_drivers.scenario_assumptions: Proof outputs {'low': 0.0, 'base': 4.5, 'high': 10.0}; probability and timing judgments explicit in graph.

top_value_drivers.label: FDA STEMI-without-shock approval milestone
top_value_drivers.scenario_assumptions: Proof outputs {'low': 0.0, 'base': 2.625, 'high': 7.5}; probability and timing judgments explicit in graph.

top_value_drivers.label: Tax, timing, definition, and illiquidity reserve
top_value_drivers.scenario_assumptions: Proof outputs {'low': -4.0, 'base': -2.0, 'high': -0.5}; probability and timing judgments explicit in graph.

source_lineage.locator: Milestone Payment (a)(i): $17.50 per CVR if Net Sales Milestone achieved during 2028 Measurement Period
Milestone Payment (a)(ii): $8.75 per CVR if achieved during 2028-29 Measurement Period after missing 2028 period
Net Sales Milestone: aggregate worldwide Net Sales exceeds $3,700,000,000
Full year revenue totaled $1.032 billion for fiscal year ended March 31, 2022
Milestone Payment (b): $7.50 per CVR for FDA Approval Milestone
Milestone Payment (c): $10.00 per CVR for Clinical Recommendation Milestone

blockers: option component clinical_recommendation_milestone requires probability, timing, and remaining-capital treatment
option component fda_stemi_milestone requires probability, timing, and remaining-capital treatment
option component net_sales_milestone requires probability, timing, and remaining-capital treatment

required_refresh_triggers: new filing or material operating update

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

universal_valuation_contract.decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material claim is valued exactly once by a valid calculation proof and every material evidence blocker is resolved.
